title: Knarfy's pirate modpack
description: An unofficial collection of most of the mods from the Knarfy Pirate video.
body:
# IMPORTANT
2 of the main mods from his video, sharks mod, and pirates and looters could not be included in this modpack, so you will have to download them yourself from curseforge.

Links:

[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pirates-and-looters-mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pirates-and-looters-mod)
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minecraft-shark-mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minecraft-shark-mod)
# Information

On June 1, 2024 Knarfy released a video with him and his friends playing minecraft with a pirate modpack. This is my attempt at gathering his mods into one easily accessable modpack.


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/vk4pxbFgMOo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
His video.   

### This modpack features the following mods from curseforge:

- [Pirate hats](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pirate-hats)
- [Pirates armory](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pirates-armoury)
- [Treasure2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/treasure2)

Sorry if this is a bit buggy, I have no idea how to fix launching errors.
